The '''lava worm''' was a hardy, serpentine creature native to the lava pools of [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]].

Another kind of lava worm was said to inhabit the molten moon [[Rennokk]]. A [[Tarasin]] named [[Kum'Jushkin]] reported his expedition being attacked by one. It might have no relation to the Nkllon worm beyond the name.

{{Creature-stub}}
